title: Storage Blocks
body:
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7382bb83718b8344b422e0352afa6c2ac18539f6.png)


[![discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/2qn652Uytz) [![forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/forge-000000?style=for-the-badge&logoUrl=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MinecraftForge/branding@master/F_logo_small.gif&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-blocks)
## BLOCKS
- Feather Crate
- Leather Crate
- Gunpowder Crate
- Paper Crate
- Blaze Rod Crate
- Blaze Powder Crate
- Bone Crate
- Sugar Crate
- String Crate
- Sugar Cane Crate


## WHAT IS THIS MOD?

This is the mod that adds new crates in Minecraft!

## WHAT DOES THIS MOD ADD?
This mod adds new 10 crates. (this number can be higher in the newer future)


## WHAT IS THIS MOD FOR?
When you use a lot of items, you may need to use more space. With the help of the mod you can collect items into blocks and you will have more space.

## HOW TO CREATE ANY OF THESE CRATES?
Put 9 items to get it as if you create any block.
